fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 63 is `if not clamp:`, which is the inverse of the correct logic. Clamping is incorrectly applied when `clamp=False` and skipped when `clamp=True`.

spec.expr: (clamp and (y__3 >= min(y0, y1) and y__3 <= max(y0, y1))) or (not clamp and y__3 == y__1)

constraints.intent: After the conditional, the value of y must be clamped if and only if clamp is true.

spec.expr: y__1 >= min(y0, y1) and y__1 <= max(y0, y1)

constraints.intent: When clamping is enabled (but the logic is missing), the value must be within the y-range.
When not clamping, the value of y should be the unaltered interpolated value.
